title: MFALME Manual Subscription Architecture Restoration
summary: MFALME PIN/security architecture restored on VPS production. Nassani phone-number extensions preserved. Render deploy blocked by missing RENDER_API_DEPLOY_HOOK.

root_cause.description: Nassani Admin diverged from MFALME TV Admin (E:\MFALME ADMIN\NassaniAdmin) by removing the shared sensitive-action PIN gate on manual grant endpoints and replacing it with phone-only validation. MFALME uses verifyAdminSensitiveActionPassword (default 3030) on POST /grant, pin-status with usesSharedActionPassword, and explicit deviceSubscriptionBus/liveSyncBus emits in the grant route. Nassani retained phone storage/SMS/custom subscription but dropped PIN verification, pin-status parity, and route-level SSE bus emits.
root_cause.regression_introduced: Commit e318ee0 (Fix manual subscription grants: custom dates, phone SMS, auth persistence) removed PIN requirement in favor of phone-only grant auth

files_restored: server/src/routes/manualSubscriptionAdmin.js (PIN gate, pin-status, bus emits on grant/grant-custom)
src/lib/api.js (getManualSubscriptionPinStatus, postManualSubscriptionSetupPin, pin+phone on grant APIs)
src/pages/ManualSubscriptionPage.jsx (Security PIN + Phone Number on grant/custom tabs)
files_unchanged_by_design: server/src/billingStore.js (stacking, manual_grant:{id}, SMS, phone registry, notifySubscriptionActivated — already complete)
Payment logic, subscription expiry calculations, transfer logic, offer code logic, user balances
Existing production subscriptions and customer data

database_verification.notes: No migrations applied. History endpoint returns 62 grant rows with customExpiry, manualCustom, planName, createdBy fields intact.

deployment.render_deploy: FAIL — RENDER_API_DEPLOY_HOOK not configured in GitHub secrets

api_verification_vps.grant_phone_required: PASS HTTP 400 phone is required (Nassani preserved)
api_verification_vps.subscription_stream_sse: PRESERVED via notifySubscriptionActivated + route-level bus emits
api_verification_vps.manual_grant_metadata_live: PARTIAL 27/51 active devices (pre-existing inactive/superseded grant rows; not introduced by this restore)

api_verification_render.status: NOT_VERIFIED — still on 72ce16f, 2 commits behind VPS
api_verification_render.action_required: Add RENDER_API_DEPLOY_HOOK to GitHub secrets and redeploy nassani-admin-api

regression_results.phone_number_input: PASS — Phone Number field on grant and custom tabs unchanged

confirmation: All admin users on VPS (api.nassanitv.com) now receive the restored MFALME Manual Subscription PIN architecture with Nassani phone-number functionality preserved. Existing subscriptions, expiry dates, and customer phone records were not modified. Render API requires deploy-hook configuration before parity is complete.
